description: Headless cross-browser E2E testing for TypeScript. Write one test, run it across Chromium, Firefox, and Safari (WebKit) with full type safety.
rules: Use crossBrowserSuite() to write tests that run across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit
Use page.locator() to find elements by CSS selector
Use page.expectTitle(), page.expectURL(), element.expectVisible() for assertions
Use ensureAll() to auto-install browsers and system dependencies
The testing module is at src/testing/cross-browser.ts
TypeScript ESM only, require module: Node16 in tsconfig
